nasb.text: Nevertheless, the people refused to listen to the voice of Samuel, and they said, “No, but there shall be a king over us,

esv.text: But the people refused to obey the voice of Samuel. And they said, “No! But there shall be a king over us,

cnv.text: 眾民竟不肯聽從撒母耳的話，說：“不，我們要一個王治理我們，

ccb.text: 民众却不肯听从撒母耳的话。他们说：“不，我们想要一个王治理我们，
